reasoning: 8x zoom reveals a pixel art energy potion with generally clean construction but several marginal issues. Sub-pixel features: none detected — pixel grid is respected throughout. AA edges: clean hard-pixel boundaries, correct for pixel art. Noise in solid areas: 2-3 isolated stray pixels visible at the lower perimeter of the bottle in 8x view, not clearly intentional shadow/decoration pixels. Inconsistent outlines: outline is predominantly 1px black but at the bottom-left corner of the 8x sprite there are 1-2 pixel gaps breaking the silhouette continuity. Gradient vs hard tones: palette is discrete (dark green, mid green, yellow-gold, white, brown-cork) — no gradient banding detected, this is clean. Pattern artifacts: the diagonal green-yellow stripe is consistent and intentional. Melting details: none. Asymmetry: the bottle body leans very slightly left at pixel level in 8x, not severe but detectable. Color bleed: minor 1-pixel color contamination at a few green-to-yellow stripe boundaries. Semantic: bottle silhouette with cork cap, striped liquid body, and specular highlight reads clearly as an energy potion — no semantic failure. Overall the sprite is functional pixel art but the stray edge pixels and minor outline gap prevent a clean pass.
